ts_note: ABLATION CONVERGENCE · deterministic · LLM-free · held-out · both paths run the real walk

alpha_greek.reads: the reef contributes the ENTIRE rule+hat layer; the general model routes on its own but pulls 0 rules / 0 hats without the reef

story: General intelligence finds the lane on its own (routing survives ablation). The REEF is what snaps it to the correct rules and playbook — 0→100% hats, 0→97%-precise rules — automatically, without prompting the model with all 181 rules. That gap is the product.
